pi_items.source: Verified from setup_opentoonz.sh and the official OpenToonz sample GitHub repository structure.
Verified from setup_task.sh which explicitly creates this directory for outputs.
Parsed dwanko_run.tnz XML: it contains 72 frames. The requirement to render at least 24 frames is valid.
Parsed dwanko_run.tnz XML: the output resolution is 1920x1080. Rendering at least 24 frames of 1080p images will safely exceed 200KB.
Task description requests 'Particles' effect (snow, sparkles) and verifier VLM prompts check for it.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on an official OpenToonz sample scene 'dwanko_run.tnz' located in '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/'. The scene uses a 1920x1080 camera resolution and contains 72 frames. The rendering requirement of at least 24 frames is verified as possible, and the corresponding minimum file size of 200KB is valid for this 1080p output sequence.
